name: agent-harness-flight-recorder
description: Privacy-first local work-episode telemetry for Codex and Claude Code lifecycle hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Record privacy-safe agent work events locally.
interface.longDescription: Observe Codex and Claude Code lifecycle events through one privacy-first schema without storing raw prompts, code, command input, tool output, transcripts, or workspace paths.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my local agent flight-recorder events without exposing raw work content.
